title: chalk() with no arguments returns an empty string silently
body: Calling `chalk.red()` with zero arguments falls through to `(...strings) => strings.join(' ')` in chalkFactory, returning `''` instead of throwing or returning something that signals 'no input was given'. Is this intentional, or should it match String.prototype semantics more explicitly?

title: Track dropping the String.prototype.replaceAll polyfill for Node 16+
body: utilities.js has a TODO ('When targeting Node.js 16, use String.prototype.replaceAll') directly above the hand-rolled stringReplaceAll implementation. Since the package's engines field has presumably moved past Node 16 by now, can this be swapped for the native method to drop the extra code?

title: Error message for invalid `level` option doesn't mention forcing truecolor
body: applyOptions() throws 'The `level` option should be an integer from 0 to 3' when given an invalid level, but doesn't mention that level 3 corresponds to truecolor/ansi16m -- new users trying to force 24-bit color output in a CI environment don't know what value to actually pass.

title: visible style behaves inconsistently with NO_COLOR + FORCE_COLOR both set
body: test/no-color-support.js and test/visible.js don't seem to cover the case where both NO_COLOR and FORCE_COLOR env vars are set at the same time -- in that combination `.visible` output was inconsistent between two runs in our CI, suggesting a precedence bug in supportsColor resolution that isn't caught by the current test suite.
